title: Rend
description: A dead-simple block/item rendering mod. No bells, no whistles.
body:
A dead-simple block/item rendering mod for Fabric/Quilt 1.18.2/1.19.2. Continuation of BlockRenderer.

Works the same way as BlockRenderer; press \` (grave — rebindable) while hovering an item in an inventory to render it. Ctrl+\` opens a GUI to render a ton of stuff all at once. Renders go into `.minecraft/renders`.

*Really* janky and buggy. Sorry.

## Predecessors

* [Fabric/Forge 1.14-1.16 by AterAnimAvis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-renderer)
* [Forge 1.7-1.12 by unascribed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockrenderer)
